scripts.predev: npm run build:eliza -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.dev:test: dotenv -e packages/web/.env.test -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npm run dev -w @background-agents/web
scripts.predev:electron: npm run build:eliza -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @background-agents/desktop
scripts.dev:electron: dotenv -e packages/desktop/.env -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'npm run dev -w @background-agents/web & sleep 3 && electron packages/desktop/dist/main.js'
scripts.prisma:migrate: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=packages/web/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=packages/web/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:status: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npx prisma migrate status --schema=packages/web/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npm run build -w @background-agents/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build:sdk && npm run prisma:generate && dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npm run build -w @background-agents/web
scripts.start:electron: dotenv -e packages/desktop/.env -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'BACKGROUND_AGENTS_URL="${BACKGROUND_AGENTS_URL:-https://backgrounder.dev}" npm run start -w @background-agents/desktop'
